APHRODITEANCIENT-BROKEN_RESOLVE.title: Broken Resolve
APHRODITEANCIENT-BROKEN_RESOLVE.descript: [gold]Weak[/gold] effectiveness is doubled, up to a maximum of [blue]50%[/blue].
APHRODITEANCIENT-BROKEN_RESOLVE.flavor: "Try as I might, I just can't help but feel the sting of being spurned. And I don't like it, not a little bit. So now I have to sting you back!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-DIFFERENT_LEAGUE.title: Different League
APHRODITEANCIENT-DIFFERENT_LEAGUE.descri: You take [blue]{LessDamage}[/blue] less damage from enemy attacks.
APHRODITEANCIENT-DIFFERENT_LEAGUE.flavor: "We're just two lovely goddesses together having a night out!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-FLUTTER_FLOURISH.title: Flutter Flourish
APHRODITEANCIENT-FLUTTER_FLOURISH.descri: Every [blue]4th[/blue] Skill you play is free.
APHRODITEANCIENT-FLUTTER_FLOURISH.flavor: "The more distracted you can make them, the easier they are to kill!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-GLAMOUR_GAIN.title: Glamour Gain
APHRODITEANCIENT-GLAMOUR_GAIN.descriptio: The first time each turn you apply a debuff to an enemy, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
APHRODITEANCIENT-GLAMOUR_GAIN.flavor: "Why, you look positively stunning in all that silver light!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-HEALTHY_REBOUND.title: Healthy Rebound
APHRODITEANCIENT-HEALTHY_REBOUND.descrip: At the start of each Normal/Elite/Boss combat, heal [blue]5[/blue]/[blue]15[/blue]/[blue]Full[/blue] HP.
APHRODITEANCIENT-HEALTHY_REBOUND.flavor: "Though don't despair! Your heart yet beats, doesn't it?"
APHRODITEANCIENT-HEARTBREAK_STRIKE.title: Heartbreak Strike
APHRODITEANCIENT-HEARTBREAK_STRIKE.descr: Your Attacks deal [blue]{MoreDamagePercent}%[/blue] more damage for each [gold]Weak[/gold] on the enemy and apply [blue]{WeakPower}[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] on every hit.
APHRODITEANCIENT-HEARTBREAK_STRIKE.flavo: "At this rate, you'll end up breaking more hearts than me!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-NERVOUS_WRECK.title: Nervous Wreck
APHRODITEANCIENT-NERVOUS_WRECK.descripti: Whenever you apply debuffs on enemies, apply twice as much.
APHRODITEANCIENT-NERVOUS_WRECK.flavor: "Our emotions ran a little hot there, didn't they... I still can feel my heart racing, and if I'm not mistaken, yours might have been, too!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-SHAMELESS_ATTITUDE.desc: Your Attacks deal [blue]33.(3)%[/blue] more damage. If you have [blue]50%[/blue] HP or more, your Attacks deal [blue]66.(6)%[/blue] more damage instead.
APHRODITEANCIENT-SHAMELESS_ATTITUDE.flav: "Oh, gorgeous. If pride and vanity are truly weaknesses, then I'm about to let myself be very vulnerable with you here..."
APHRODITEANCIENT-SISYPHUS_AID.title: Sisyphus' Aid
APHRODITEANCIENT-SISYPHUS_AID.descriptio: At the start of each combat, [gold]Rolling Boulder[/gold] is played for free.
APHRODITEANCIENT-SISYPHUS_AID.flavor: "Bouldy says whatever we can do to help, we'll do it!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-SPIRITUAL_AFFIRMATION.d: Upon pickup, gain [blue]{MaxHp}[/blue] Max HP and [blue]{Gold}[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold].
APHRODITEANCIENT-SPIRITUAL_AFFIRMATION.f: "As long as you have love in your heart, you'll probably be fine!"
APHRODITEANCIENT-SWEET_NECTAR.title: Sweet Nectar
APHRODITEANCIENT-SWEET_NECTAR.descriptio: Whenever you [gold]Smith[/gold] at a Rest Site, upgrade [blue]{Cards}[/blue] other random cards.
APHRODITEANCIENT-SWEET_SURRENDER.title: Sweet Surrender
APHRODITEANCIENT-SWEET_SURRENDER.descrip: Whenever you apply [gold]Weak[/gold], apply the same amount of [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] and [gold]Charm[/gold].
APHRODITEANCIENT-SWEET_SURRENDER.flavor: "Between us goddesses, may you kill everybody standing in your way!"
